summary: Implemented other sport recording page with sport type grid (2x2 preset cards + custom button), dynamic metric input form, and custom sport editor. All components follow injected-props pattern for testability. Created helper functions for validation, formatting, and metric input building.
keyDecisions: Used injected-props pattern for OtherSportScreen (same as BodyDataScreen) to maximize testability
SportTypeGrid renders 2x2 grid with emoji icons for preset types and dashed-border button for custom
MetricInputForm dynamically generates inputs from SportMetric definitions with unit suffixes
CustomSportEditor is a push page with preset metric multi-select + custom metric name/unit inputs
Validation rejects missing sport type, future dates, empty metrics, and negative/NaN values
PRESET_SPORT_ICONS and DEFAULT_METRICS_BY_SPORT constants define default configurations per sport type

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Sport type grid: 2x2 preset cards + custom sport button
Selecting a sport type highlights it and shows dynamic input form below
Dynamic form: input fields generated from SportMetric definitions for selected type
Preset metrics: distance, time, laps, pace, heart rate, calories
Custom sport editor (push page): name input + metric multi-select (preset + custom)
Save creates OtherSportRecord + SportMetricValue entries (handler wired, repo integration deferred)
Custom sport types saved for reuse (handler wired, auto-loads metrics on selection)
Date from calendar passed as default
Back returns to calendar with updated day display (handler wired)

notes: 41 new tests for other sport page helpers and component exports. Total suite 961 tests all passing. Route files updated to use new components with placeholder handlers for repo integration.
